item.title: James Chai appoints lawyers, pledges full cooperation with MACC
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The former aide to ex-economy minister Rafizi Ramli says his lawyers would liaise with MACC to arrange a session for him to give his statement.
Matched: law(+3), corruption(+3), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Come home to assist in probe, MACC tells James Chai
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The anti-graft agency says cooperation with law enforcement authorities is a basic obligation of any citizen when required to assist an investigation.
Matched: law(+3), corruption(+3), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Daim’s family, lawyers file suit to block ‘topple govt’ probe
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The five plaintiffs are seeking a declaration that the investigation is unlawful, tainted with bad faith, and carried out with ulterior purposes.
Matched: law(+3), corruption(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: MACC plays part in global crackdown on LeakBase forum
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The anti-graft agency says the platform functioned as an online marketplace for stolen data such as credit and debit card numbers.

item.title: Hold state and Dewan elections together, says Johor PH
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The state PH sets up four new committees in preparation for the coming state assembly and parliamentary elections.

item.title: I’ll draft the letter now, KJ says after ‘return to Umno’ call
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Three-term MP Khairy Jamaluddin was sacked from Umno in January 2023 for breaching party discipline during the 2022 general election.

item.title: Return to sender: containers with e-waste linked to 9 countries
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today

item.title: Woman admits to conspiring to rob husband of RM500,000
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Shameem Begum Abdul Said pleads guilty to a gang robbery charge alongside a co-accused, who is partially paralysed.

item.title: Anwar urges caution in spending, business deals as Mideast crisis worsens

item.title: Rafizi's former aide leaves it to lawyers to liaise with MACC
item.description:
Source: The Star Nation (Malaysia)
PETALING JAYA: Chai Jin Shern (James Chai), a former aide to Datuk Seri Rafizi Ramli, says he will leave it to his lawyers to liaise with the Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission (MACC) after the anti-graft body issued a notice seeking to trace him. Read full story
Matched: law(+3), corruption(+3), ai(+3)
